modelIdentification.name: JLVC-Logistics
modelIdentification.purpose: JLVC-Logistics provides Logistics components neccessary for use in the JLVC federation.
modelIdentification.description: This FOM module contains the objects and interactions necessary for Logistics communication in the JLVC Federation.
modelIdentification.useHistory: JLVC2024 - Draft 1 of JLVC Modular FOM. Removed redundant count parameter NumContents from CargoAirDrop.

JLVC2024 - JSJ7JLVC-21615: Replace Additional Octet Datatypes: Removed OctetArray12 and OctetArray20. Created ClassOfSupplyEnum8 and UseOfSupplyEnum8. Created LoadID and LogisticsOwner. Updated dataTypes in LogSupplyStruct to use new dataTypes instead of octets.
JLVC2024 - Updated version number from 2024 to 2.
JLVC2025 - Version 3: Added TowedBy attribute to Cargo. Added EventID parameter to LogHealthUpdate.
JLVC2026 - Version 4: Removed old RPRnotes. Updated reference dependencies to use the new RPRv3 module names.

reference.identification: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Base FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Enumerations FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Foundation FOM Module

attribute.name: Contents
attribute.semantics: Could be people, equipment or supply items. Cardinality "0+,Contents"

attribute.name: TowedBy
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the towing entity (ie. Who is pulling). If the value is empty, then no entity is pulling the cargo.

attribute.name: LVCIndicator
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the data contained in this object instance is related to a Live, Virtual, or Constructive entity.

interactionClass.name: AirliftUpdate
interactionClass.semantics: an update to coordinate intra-theater airlift

parameter.name: AircraftId
parameter.semantics: RTIObjectId of the aircraft.

parameter.name: MissionNumber
parameter.semantics: AMC Mission Number

parameter.name: Action
parameter.semantics: current status of airlift

parameter.name: Route
parameter.semantics: OPTIONAL. Airlift location or entire route when diverting.

parameter.name: Contents
parameter.semantics: the contents of the cargo air drop

parameter.name: convoyId
parameter.semantics: OPTIONAL

parameter.name: reason
parameter.semantics: OPTIONAL

parameter.name: route
parameter.semantics: OPTIONAL. Point at which convoy is located, or entire route when diverting

interactionClass.name: EntityControl
interactionClass.semantics: Replaces LogMaintance as a method of letting one federate control another\'s entities, generally for purposes of (movement related to) repair operations

parameter.name: newOrientation
parameter.semantics: OPTIONAL GCC Orientation

parameter.name: newVelocity
parameter.semantics: OPTIONAL GCC Velocity

parameter.name: takeControl
parameter.semantics: True will take or keep control, false will release control

parameter.name: useTowing
parameter.semantics: Use towing rather than magic move. Controlling entity will tow controlled entity. False indicates towing is to be released. OPTIONAL

parameter.name: controlNotes
parameter.semantics: Notes regarding control request (e.g., Being towed to depot Being MedEvac-ed to hospital) OPTIONAL

parameter.name: controllingEntity
parameter.semantics: The RTI name of the entity that will have responsibility for control, i.e. an MCP or Towing vehicle.

parameter.name: newLocation
parameter.semantics: GCC Position (x,y,z) for magic re-position from another federate. This enables another model to move an entity to a collection point. OPTIONAL

parameter.name: controlledEntity
parameter.semantics: The RTI name of the entity that will be temporarily controlled by another federate.

parameter.name: LVCID
parameter.semantics: ID of aggregate on which adjustment should occur

parameter.name: owningFederate
parameter.semantics: Site and app of federate which should update equipment counts

parameter.name: requestingFederate
parameter.semantics: Site and app of requesting federate

interactionClass.name: LogAssessmentRequest
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction requesting a resource report for a particular entity.

parameter.name: entity
parameter.semantics: The entity to which the resource report is made.

interactionClass.name: LogHealthUpdate
interactionClass.semantics: Interaction to change the health state of an entity

parameter.name: EventID
parameter.semantics: Optional: The EventID (UUID) of a FISE event that is associated with the LogHealthUpdate.

parameter.name: EntityOwner
parameter.semantics: the owner making a logisticsassessment interaction

parameter.name: Resources
parameter.semantics: Structure defining the type of supply and supply level.

parameter.name: Resources
parameter.semantics: the details of the supplies provided

parameter.name: Resupplyee
parameter.semantics: The object being resupplied

interactionClass.name: LogReport
interactionClass.semantics: a logistics report on an object

parameter.name: LVCID
parameter.semantics: The JLVC_ID of the supply transfer point/aggregate on which log is being reported.

parameter.name: publisher
parameter.semantics: Publisher of the report

parameter.name: logDetails
parameter.semantics: Details for each object

parameter.name: AdjustedObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: RTI object ID of object on which logistics is being reported

interactionClass.name: OrgUpdateInteraction
interactionClass.semantics: Defines changes to TOE tree relationships

parameter.name: BaseSuperior
parameter.semantics: Identifier of the primary Superior. By convention, the TOE Superior.

parameter.name: Entity
parameter.semantics: Identifier for the Entity whose relationsihps are being described. Note that Units are a type of Entity for purposes of Relationships.

parameter.name: IsUnit
parameter.semantics: Entity is an Organizational Unit

parameter.name: RelationshipArray
parameter.semantics: Array of Relationship data (may be zero bytes) where the Superior is different than the BaseSuperior. Cardinality 0+.

interactionClass.name: PersonnelAdjust
interactionClass.semantics: an interaction requesting an change in personnel in a particular aggregate.

parameter.name: LVCID
parameter.semantics: ID of aggregate on which adjustment should occur

parameter.name: owningFederate
parameter.semantics: Site and app of federate which should update personnel counts.

parameter.name: requestingFederate
parameter.semantics: Site and app of federate making request.

parameter.name: adjustmentType
parameter.semantics: the type of adjustment requested

parameter.name: personnelList
parameter.semantics: The details regarding the person(nel) being adjusted. Cardinality 1+

parameter.name: Reason
parameter.semantics: the reason for the adjustment

parameter.name: TrackingID
parameter.semantics: the tracking id number for the request

interactionClass.name: SupplyAdjust
interactionClass.semantics: interaction to adjust the level of supplies in an object

parameter.name: LVCID
parameter.semantics: ID of aggregate on which adjustment should occur

parameter.name: owningFederate
parameter.semantics: owning Federate

parameter.name: requestingFederate
parameter.semantics: requesting Federate

parameter.name: adjustmentType
parameter.semantics: adjustment type

parameter.name: supplyList
parameter.semantics: the supply details

parameter.name: Reason
parameter.semantics: the reason for the adjustment

parameter.name: TrackingID
parameter.semantics: Unique id to track request

parameter.name: AdjustedObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: RTI object ID of object whose supplies are being adjusted

parameter.name: UnitID
parameter.semantics: The LVCID of the unit

parameter.name: OwningFederate
parameter.semantics: Owning Federate

parameter.name: Activate
parameter.semantics: True if action of interaction is to Activate, False if action is to De-activate.

parameter.name: Location
parameter.semantics: location to activate

parameter.name: Entities
parameter.semantics: The entities, by LVCID, in the unit.

parameter.name: UIC
parameter.semantics: Real World unique unit identifier - all units reported to BCS3 have valid UICs

enumeratedData.name: LogDamageReasonEnum32
enumeratedData.semantics: The logistics reason for the damage: battle damage, maintenance, non battle damage.

arrayData.name: CargoItemStructArray
arrayData.semantics: zero or more CargoItemStruct elements, not to exceed NumContents; [0..NumContents]

arrayData.name: EquipmentDetailsStructArray
arrayData.semantics: zero or more items of equipment

arrayData.name: EquipmentDetailsStructArray1Plus
arrayData.semantics: one or more items of equipment

arrayData.name: LoadID
arrayData.semantics: The identifier of the load. String of up to 20 ASCII characters. Unused characters shall be indicated by Null (0) values.

arrayData.name: LogisticsOwner
arrayData.semantics: The owner of the load. String of up to 12 ASCII characters. Unused characters shall be indicated by Null (0) values.

arrayData.name: VehicleConfigurationStructArray
arrayData.semantics: zero or more elements of VehicleConfigurationStruct.

fixedRecordData.name: DamageDetailStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specifies the details of the damage

field.name: numDamaged
field.semantics: the number of objects damaged.

field.name: damageType
field.semantics: The DIS damage state.

field.name: damageReason
field.semantics: The logistics reason for the damage: battle damage, maintenance, non battle damage.

fixedRecordData.name: LogisticsStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: supply details for a particular item

field.name: Authorized
field.semantics: the authorized quantity of the item

field.name: reorderPoint
field.semantics: the amount of the item at which reorder is made

field.name: stockageObjective
field.semantics: the stockage objective for the item

field.name: logSupply
field.semantics: details of the supply load

fixedRecordData.name: LogDetailsStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: details on logistics assets for an object

field.name: Amount
field.semantics: the amount of the item

field.name: classOfSupply
field.semantics: the class of supply of the item

field.name: useOfSupply
field.semantics: the use of the supply type

field.name: loadIdentifier
field.semantics: The identifier of the load.

field.name: logisticsOwner
field.semantics: The owner of the load

field.name: Location
field.semantics: REQUIRED

field.name: ArrivalTime
field.semantics: OPTIONAL. Not Used for AirliftUpdate Interaction.

field.name: DepartureTime
field.semantics: OPTIONAL. Not Used for AirliftUpdate Interaction.

field.name: Description
field.semantics: OPTIONAL. Description of location ? i.e. ICAO, GEOLOC, etc. ? not guaranteed to be filled out or meaningful unless agreed upon in advance.

field.name: BoundingType
field.semantics: OPTIONAL. Enumerated values: ArriveNLT, DepartNET, DelayAtLocation, ScheduleAsDesired

field.name: BoundingTime
field.semantics: OPTIONAL. Offset from current time in minutes for arrival and departure times or number of minutes to delay.

field.name: Status
field.semantics: OPTIONAL. Enumerated values: NotVisited, Enroute, Visited, Loading, Unloading

field.name: PointType
field.semantics: OPTIONAL. Enumerated values: Start, Pickup, DropOff, End

field.name: vehicleId
field.semantics: OPTIONAL

field.name: associatedTrailer
field.semantics: OPTIONAL

field.name: trailerId
field.semantics: OPTIONAL
